name: Fresh Tagliatelle with Garlic, Rucola and Sun
recipeIngredient: 2 bunches rucola, stemmed, washed and spun dry to yield 4 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 quarts water to a boil in a large spaghetti pot and add 2 tablespoons salt.
2. In a 12-inch sauté pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until light golden brown.
3. Add sundried tomato pieces and wine, then remove from heat.
4. Drop the Tagliatelle into boiling water and cook until tender (about 1 minute). Drain pasta in a colander.
5. Pour the drained pasta into the pan with sundried tomatoes. Return to heat and toss in the rucola.
6. Stir gently for about 30 seconds until rucola is slightly wilted and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
